channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Friday, March 06
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 04:44 AM (1.212 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 10:46 AM (0.329 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: E 12 G 18 mph
